mapper.select: select r.id, r.user_id, r.title, r.cover, r.secret, r.introduce, r.notice, r.rtmp_url, r.disabled, r.`status`, r.category_id, r.push_url, r.pull_url, r.create_time, r.update_time, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar, u.signature as user_signature, c.name as category_name, c.icon as category_icon from room r left join user u on r.user_id = u.id left join category c on r.category_id = c.id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
